code:
%% Feature Mindmap Template
%% Replace with your actual feature breakdown

mindmap
  root(Retail_PointOfSale))
    Authentication
      Login
        Email/Password
        Social OAuth
        SSO/SAML
      Registration
        Email verification
        Onboarding flow
      Security
        2FA/MFA
        Session management
        Password policies
    User Management
      Profiles
        Avatar upload
        Preferences
        Notifications
      Organisations
        Team creation
        Role assignment
        Invitations
      Permissions
        Role-based access
        Resource sharing
        Audit logging
    Core Features
      Dashboard
        Analytics widgets
        Quick actions
        Recent activity
      Projects
        CRUD operations
        Collaboration
        Version history
      Tasks
        Assignment
        Due dates
        Comments
        Attachments
    Integrations
      APIs
        REST endpoints
        GraphQL
        Webhooks
      Third-party
        Slack
        GitHub
        Jira
      Import/Export
        CSV
        JSON
        PDF reports
    Infrastructure
      Performance
        Caching
        CDN
        Database optimisation
      Reliability
        Backups
        Monitoring
        Alerting
      Scalability
        Load balancing
        Auto-scaling
        Multi-region

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为零售POS系统做一个功能全景图，方便给新团队做onboarding。核心围绕Authentication、User Management、Core Features、Integrations和Infrastructure这五大块展开。
明白，我先确认一下层级结构。Authentication下面分Login、Registration、Security三层对吗？Login这边需要包含Email/Password、Social OAuth和SSO/SAML这三种方式？
对的，另外Registration要强调Email verification和Onboarding flow，Security这块加上2FA/MFA、Session management和Password policies。
好，Authentication分支已完成。User Management这块我放了Profiles、Organisations和Permissions三个子节点，Profiles下面有Avatar upload、Preferences和Notifications。
Core Features需要突出Dashboard和Projects，Dashboard要有Analytics widgets、Quick actions和Recent activity，Projects那边CRUD operations和Collaboration是重点。
Integrations这块我打算分APIs、Third-party和Import/Export，APIs下面放REST endpoints、GraphQL和Webhooks。Third-party需要Slack、GitHub和Jira对吧？
没错，Import/Export要包含CSV、JSON和PDF reports。最后Infrastructure分Performance、Reliability和Scalability，Scalability下面加上Multi-region部署。
全部完成了，Performance放了Caching、CDN和Database optimisation，Reliability包含Backups、Monitoring和Alerting，Scalability有Load balancing、Auto-scaling和Multi-region。您看下整体结构是否符合预期？
